case_title: BRADLEY JAMES SCOTT VS. BERNARD LEWIS FAMILY TRUST et al

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER SCOTT, BRADLEY JAMES

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER BRADLEY SCOTT'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD TO EXPUNGE ARBITRATION FROM THE RECORDS OF BRADLEY JAMES SCOTT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award To Expunge Arbitration From The Records Of Bradley James Scott
Off Calendar Sep-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ORIET COHEN-SNODE, MARLAN ZUSMAN & COMPTON, 415.438.4415, FOR PETITIONER BRADLEY JAMES SCOTT; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER BRADLEY SCOTT'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award To Expunge Arbitration From The Records Of Bradley James Scott is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. JUDGMENT signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
